neutral: My coffee turned out perfect this morning, and I've got a good feeling about today. The sun is finally out and I've got nowhere to be, so I'm just going to enjoy the walk.
calm: Take a slow breath and look at me for a second. Nothing is falling apart yet, and we can handle this one step at a time without panicking.
cheerful: There you are! I was really hoping something nice would happen this morning, and honestly, you showing up totally counts.
disgusted: Oh my God... what is that smell? It's sour, rotten, and so thick I can almost taste it. Please get it away from me right now.
excited: Wait, seriously? We actually pulled it off, and after everything that almost went wrong, it finally worked exactly the way we hoped it would!
sadness: I kept thinking you might still come back somehow, even long after I had every reason to understand that some things do not return once they are gone.
embarassed: I can't believe I just did that. Oh my God... please don't look at me right now, I already want to disappear.
anger: Don't stand there trying to twist this around on me again. Just look me in the eye for once and tell me the truth without hiding behind excuses.
nervous: Did you hear that just now? I swear there is something moving out there, and I really don't think we should stay here any longer.
terrified: Please don't make me go back in there. I know they're still in there. I know they are. Please... please don't leave me alone.
confident: Listen to me carefully for a moment. This is the right move, and I know exactly why it works, even if it doesn't make sense to everyone yet.
amused: Okay, that was actually funny. I can't stop laughing, somehow it just keeps getting better.
curious: That's really interesting, actually. What do you think would happen if we approached it from the other side and tried something slightly different this time?
relieved: Oh, thank God... for a second there, I really thought everything had gone wrong.
tired: I know, I know... just give me a second. I am running on almost nothing right now.
surprised: Oh, wait, really? You knew the whole time? Wow... I did not expect that.
determined: No. We're not stopping now. We've come too far, worked too hard, and pushed through too much to quit at the very end.
compassionate: I know this hurts more than you want to admit, and you really do not have to carry all of it alone while pretending you're fine.
gently: Hey... it's alright now. You don't have to explain everything tonight, and you don't have to be strong for me every second.
playfully: Oh, don't look at me like that. You started it. I'm just the chaos you invited in.
romantic: When you look at me like that, the whole world seems to go quiet for a moment, like nothing else matters except being here with you.
sarcastic: Oh, fantastic. Because clearly this day was going far too smoothly, and what it really needed was one more completely avoidable disaster.
urgent: Move, now. We are almost out of time, and if we wait even a few more seconds, this is going to get much worse.
whisper: Please... keep your voice down. Don't move, don't look, just stay still for one second.
